home.hero_desc:
Exploring the essence of East Asian philosophy through the lens of modern scholarship.
From Heavenly Stems & Earthly Branches to the Great Cycles — learn to read the patterns of life.
home.cta_desc: Experience integrated compatibility analysis combining BaZi (Four Pillars), Zi Wei Dou Shu, and Western Astrology. Supports romantic, professional, and parent-child relationships.

categories.five_elements_desc: The principles of Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water

compat.loading_desc: Calculating BaZi · Zi Wei · Solar Terms · Planetary Positions

about.title: About SajuLab
about.subtitle: Exploring the essence of East Asian philosophy through a modern lens.
about.org_desc: Specialist content blog on Korean astrology
about.what_we_do: Saju (BaZi) is far more than fortune-telling. Through the interactions of the Ten Heavenly Stems, Twelve Earthly Branches, and the Five Elements, it connects the patterns of nature with the rhythm of human life. We make this profound knowledge accessible to everyone.
about.policy: All content on this site is written for academic and educational purposes. For important personal decisions (investment, medical, legal matters), please consult the appropriate specialist.
about.cta_desc: Send us a message through the contact page.
